title: lilaea scilloides
intro: Lilaea scilloides, also known as the twayblade or adder's tongue orchid, is a type of flowering plant in the orchid family that is native to North America. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its ability to act as a diuretic and to reduce inflammation. The plant is said to have various health benefits, such as helping to treat urinary tract infections and other kidney problems, as well as acting as a natural remedy for fever and rheumatism. In herbal preparations, the roots and rhizomes of Lilaea scilloides are typically used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures that can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
